suite.name: Api Test

kw.name: Alusta Testit
Set Base URL
Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Asettaa base URL:n ympäristömuuttujasta jos määritelty

kw.name: Kirjaudu Ja Tallenna Token
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=login_session, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '69'} body=b'{"username": "mikael.mikkola@metropolia.fi", "password": "6499aamjM"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Kirjautuu sisään ja tallentaa JWT-tokenin globaaliin muuttujaan
Asettaa URL:t ja kirjautuu sisään ennen testejä

test.name: HRV-data haetaan onnistuneesti

kw.name: Hae Kubios Data
Luo Auth Header
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Luo Authorization-header tallennetulla tokenilla

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=kubios, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/kubios/user-data path_url=/api/kubios/user-data headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..V1Ig1G8Vx9-n1z0G9ELsmo8t4zv6BR8f_vPOoNb9crU', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Hakee HRV-datan Kubios-reitistä tokenilla

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Kirjautunut käyttäjä hakee HRV-datan. Odotetaan 200 OK ja results-lista vastauksessa.

test.name: Etusivu näyttää viimeisimmän analyysin tuloksen

kw.name: Hae Kubios Data
Luo Auth Header

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Varmistaa että API palauttaa readiness-arvon uusimmasta mittauksesta. Frontend käyttää tätä dashboardin score-kortissa.

test.name: Käyttäjä näkee omat profiilitietonsa

kw.name: Hae Käyttäjätiedot
Luo Auth Header
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Luo Authorization-header tallennetulla tokenilla

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=userinfo, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/kubios/user-info path_url=/api/kubios/user-info headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..V1Ig1G8Vx9-n1z0G9ELsmo8t4zv6BR8f_vPOoNb9crU', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.
Hakee käyttäjän profiilitiedot Kubios-tokenilla

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Kirjautunut käyttäjä hakee omat tietonsa. Odotetaan käyttäjän sähköposti, etunimi ja sukunimi.

test.name: Pyyntö ilman tokenia palauttaa 401

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/kubios/user-data path_url=/api/kubios/user-data headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Suojattu reitti hylkää pyynnön ilman Authorization-headeria.

suite.doc: CardioRest — API-reittien automaatiotestit Testaa Kubios-datan haku ja profiilitiedot autentikoiduilla pyynnöillä

suite.name: Auth Test

kw.name: Set Base URL
Get Environment Variable
kw.doc: Returns the value of an environment variable with the given name.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

test.name: Kirjautuminen oikeilla tunnuksilla onnistuu

kw.name: Kirjaudu Sisään
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '69'} body=b'{"username": "mikael.mikkola@metropolia.fi", "password": "6499aamjM"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.
Lähettää kirjautumispyynnön ja palauttaa response-objektin

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Käyttäjä kirjautuu oikeilla Kubios-tunnuksilla. Odotetaan 200 OK ja JWT-token vastauksessa.

test.name: Kirjautuminen väärällä salasanalla epäonnistuu

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '80'} body=b'{"username": "mikael.mikkola@metropolia.fi", "password": "vaara_salasana_12345"}'

POST Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login status=500, reason=Internal Server Error headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'none'", 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '581', 'Date': 'Mon, 13 Apr 2026 09:53:08 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body= Error 
Error: Login with Kubios failed due bad username/password
    at kubiosLogin (file:///C:/Users/Mikae/OneDrive/Tiedostot/cardiorest-be/cardiorest-be/controllers/kubios-auth-controller.js:58:12)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:103:5)
    at async postLogin (file:///C:/Users/Mikae/OneDrive/Tiedostot/cardiorest-be/cardiorest-be/controllers/kubios-auth-controller.js:141:28)
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Käyttäjä yrittää kirjautua väärällä salasanalla. Odotetaan 401 Unauthorized tai 500 virhekoodi.

test.name: Kirjautuminen tyhjillä kentillä epäonnistuu

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '32'} body=b'{"username": "", "password": ""}'

POST Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login status=500, reason=Internal Server Error headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'none'", 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '581', 'Date': 'Mon, 13 Apr 2026 09:53:10 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body= Error 
Error: Login with Kubios failed due bad username/password
    at kubiosLogin (file:///C:/Users/Mikae/OneDrive/Tiedostot/cardiorest-be/cardiorest-be/controllers/kubios-auth-controller.js:58:12)
    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:103:5)
    at async postLogin (file:///C:/Users/Mikae/OneDrive/Tiedostot/cardiorest-be/cardiorest-be/controllers/kubios-auth-controller.js:141:28)
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: Käyttäjä lähettää tyhjän kirjautumispyynnön. Odotetaan virhekoodia (400 tai 500).

suite.doc: CardioRest — Kirjautumisen automaatiotestit Testaa POST /api/auth/login -reitin eri skenaarioilla
